session_note: S24 P0 complete. Voltkin Phase 2 architecture blueprint written via Full-tier Council deliberation. R1 parallel (Claude+Grok+Gemini, ~14K tokens combined model output), Quality Gate (5 disagreements + 5 gaps surfaced, Grok blind spot on per-player cooldown fact-checked vs godlyCooldown.ts:21), R2 refinement (Grok+Gemini both ACCEPT ALL), PRIME-AUDIT (8 additive deltas: S27 migration notes, perf budget worst-case, edge cases listing, creature type config, audio plan procedural Web Audio, S25 acceptance specificity, S25 renderer fallback, S28 acceptance criterion). Output: .claude/plans/voltkin_phase2_blueprint_v1.md covering 12 decisions (10 original + Q11 frame authority + Q12 solo targeting). 3 open user-facing questions identified with recommended answers. ZERO code shipped — pure deliberation per S24 P0 scope.

priorities.label: Voltkin Phase 2 architecture blueprint — Full-tier Council deliberation (10 open questions)
priorities.check_method: Full-tier Council ran clean end-to-end: (1) Pre-deliberation: 11 prior-art source files read (world.ts, godlyRecipes/*.ts, godlyCooldown.ts, verlet.ts, bonds.ts, spatial.ts, cutsceneOverlay.ts, effects.ts, primitive.ts) to ground synthesis in actual codebase contracts. (2) R1 parallel: dispatched Grok (grok-4.20-0309-reasoning, ~5K tok output) + Gemini (gemini-2.5-pro, ~5.5K tok output) + Claude (~3.5K tok in-conversation) with structured DECISION/RATIONALE/ALTERNATIVES-REJECTED/RISK/SKETCH template per question. (3) Quality Gate: 3-way convergence matrix built; 5 disagreements with explicit resolution rule (D1 per-player cooldown fact-check overrode Grok single-slot; D2 thematic-consistency overrode Grok rise-from-ground; D3 unified-snapshot-rate overrode Grok 4-tick stride; D4 phase-through majority over Gemini bounce; D5 quiet-despawn majority over Grok 12-arc finale). 5 gaps surfaced none-of-R1s-caught: Gap A synchronous SEVER_BOND cascade redundancy; Gap B solo targeting semantics; Gap C spatial-grid extension; Gap D handoff timing; Gap E frame authority. (4) R2 refinement: both Grok+Gemini ACCEPT ALL on Quality Gate resolutions (rubber-stamp checked by PRIME-AUDIT against Grok's R1 emotional investment in D5). (5) PRIME-AUDIT 6-question audit produced 8 ADDITIVE blueprint deltas (not architecture changes — synthesis stood). (6) Blueprint written at .claude/plans/voltkin_phase2_blueprint_v1.md covering 10+2 questions + 8 audit sections + phased S25-S28 acceptance criteria + bundle budget tracking (+25 KB code, +14 KB asset, 6 KB final margin of 500 KB hard cap). (7) Active plan + reflexion + session-state updated. Real-context tokens at close: 173,969 / 1,000,000 (17.4% GREEN). ZERO code shipped — pure deliberation as scoped.
